pi_items.source: export_result.sh generates this file and verifier.py reads from it
Extracted from explicit text in dual_gps_specs.txt generated by setup_task.sh and checked against NED coordinate system definitions in the instructions.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic drone integration work order specifying Dual GPS configuration. The target file is generated dynamically at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dual_gps_specs.txt, with results correctly exported to /tmp/task_result.json. The parameter values match exactly: GPS_TYPE2 is 1 (Auto), GPS_AUTO_SWITCH is 2 (Blend), EK3_SRC1_YAW is 2 (GPS), and COMPASS_ENABLE is 0. Antenna offsets are translated correctly into the NED coordinate system, with GPS_POS1_X as -0.35 (35 cm behind CG), GPS_POS2_X as 0.35 (35 cm ahead of CG), and both Z offsets as -0.20 (20 cm above CG, where Down is +Z).
